definition: The sequence of swing highs and swing lows that define the current trend direction.
related_to: dealing_range (structure DEFINES the dealing range boundaries)
bullish_structure: Higher highs (HH) and higher lows (HL). Each new swing low is higher than the previous one.
bearish_structure: Lower highs (LH) and lower lows (LL). Each new swing high is lower than the previous one.

BOS.definition: Break of Structure — price breaks a previous swing high (bullish) or swing low (bearish) in the direction of the existing trend. CONFIRMS trend continuation.
feeds_into: order_blocks (the last opposing candle before BOS becomes the OB)
BOS.related_to: displacement — BOS is often CAUSED BY a displacement candle

CHoCH.definition: Change of Character — the FIRST break of a swing point AGAINST the current trend. Signals potential reversal.
feeds_into: dealing_range (new dealing range forms after CHoCH)
order_blocks (last candle before CHoCH = new OB in reversal direction)
CHoCH.related_to: liquidity_sweep — CHoCH often occurs AFTER a liquidity sweep (the sweep completes manipulation, CHoCH starts distribution)

MSS.definition: Market Structure Shift — LTF confirmation of a reversal. After a CHoCH on HTF, wait for MSS on LTF before entering.
MSS.feeds_into: entry_models — MSS is the LTF trigger that makes it safe to enter

CISD.definition: Change In State of Delivery — when price shifts from delivering bearish candles to bullish (or vice versa). The last opposing candle becomes the entry zone.
CISD.related_to: order_blocks — the CISD candle IS an order block by definition

multi_timeframe_rule: HTF dictates direction. LTF provides entry timing. A CHoCH on M15 means nothing if H4 is strongly bullish — it's just a pullback, not a reversal.
common_mistake: Trading every BOS/CHoCH without HTF context. A M5 CHoCH inside a H1 bullish orderblock is a BUYING opportunity.

trading_rules.rule_1: HTF structure ALWAYS overrides LTF. An M15 CHoCH against H4 trend is a pullback entry, not a reversal.
trading_rules.rule_2: BOS confirms trend — trade WITH it. CHoCH suggests reversal — wait for displacement + FVG before fading.
trading_rules.rule_3: A single CHoCH against 4+ BOS events in the same direction = noise, not reversal. Require BOS majority to flip bias.
trading_rules.rule_4: MSS on LTF (M5/M15) after HTF CHoCH = highest-conviction entry timing.
trading_rules.rule_5: Structure score 20+/30 = strong trend. Score 10-19 = developing. Below 10 = choppy (reduce size or skip).

bridge_integration.detection: detect_swings() + classify_structure() + get_current_bias(). Stricter bias requires BOS majority — single CHoCH against dominant trend returns NEUTRAL.
bridge_integration.prompt_display: structure_score (0-30) in SCORE BREAKDOWN. Grade derived from total score including structure.
bridge_integration.score_impact: Structure is the largest single component (30/100 max). Strong structure = foundation for high-grade trades.
